name: button-destructive
visual_summary: A destructive button component is a visual representation of a button that, when clicked, indicates a deletion, cancellation, or removal of data. It is often displayed in critical or alerting scenarios to emphasize the finality of the action. A developer would use this component for any application that needs to warn users of actions that cannot be undone.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready button component with the following characteristics:

Name: button-destructive
Description: A destructive button component is a visual representation of a button that, when clicked, indicates a deletion, cancellation, or removal of data. It is often displayed in critical or alerting scenarios to emphasize the finality of the action. A developer would use this component for any application that needs to warn users of actions that cannot be undone.
Style: minimal, material
Interactions: clickable, disabled-on-click, animation
Tags: button, destructive, warning, critical

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
